violations.text: The ware washing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

The ware washing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025

Hard boiled eggs were observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit in ice bath. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC added more ice at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At time of inspection, hard boiled eggs were placed hot in the refrigerator in covered containers. PIC uncovered at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Thermometers are lacking in refrigerator #1. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The door to the outside, located in the storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
Refrigerator #1 located in the storage area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 49F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ceiling tiles in the dry storage area were observed with stains from previous water damage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
